# Critical Infrastructure Icons

Please add PNG icon files to this folder with the following names:

- chemical.png - Chemical sector icon
- commercial.png - Commercial facilities sector icon
- communications.png - Communications sector icon
- manufacturing.png - Critical manufacturing sector icon
- dams.png - Dams sector icon
- defense.png - Defense industrial base sector icon
- emergency.png - Emergency services sector icon
- energy.png - Energy sector icon
- financial.png - Financial services sector icon
- food.png - Food and agriculture sector icon
- government.png - Government facilities sector icon
- healthcare.png - Healthcare and public health sector icon
- it.png - Information technology sector icon
- nuclear.png - Nuclear reactors sector icon
- transportation.png - Transportation systems sector icon
- water.png - Water and wastewater sector icon
- default.png - Default fallback icon

## Fallback Behavior

If any PNG icon file is missing or fails to load, the system will automatically fall back to displaying color-coded points (circle markers) instead of icons. Each sector has a predefined color:

- Chemical: Green (#00ff00)
- Commercial: Red (#ff0000)
- Communications: Blue (#0000ff)
- Critical Manufacturing: Yellow (#ffff00)
- Dams: Magenta (#ff00ff)
- Defense: Cyan (#00ffff)
- Emergency Services: Orange (#ffa500)
- Energy: Purple (#800080)
- Financial: Pink (#ffc0cb)
- Food & Agriculture: Brown (#a52a2a)
- Government: Gray (#808080)
- Healthcare: Orange Red (#ff4500)
- IT: Goldenrod (#daa520)
- Nuclear: Crimson (#dc143c)
- Transportation: Forest Green (#228b22)
- Water: Royal Blue (#4169e1)

Recommended icon size: 32x32 pixels
Icons should be PNG format with transparent background
